typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		{PROJECT NO.} as string,
		{PROJECT ID} as string,
		{PROJECT NAME} as string,
		{DOC ID} as string,
		DELIVERABLE as string,
		{DOCUMENT NUMBER} as string,
		{EXPEDITED ISSUE STATE} as string,
		{TYPE CLASS} as string,
		{EXPEDITED VERSION} as string,
		{EXPEDITED REVISION} as string,
		{CURRENT VERSION} as string,
		{CURRENT REVISION} as string,
		{USER TYPE} as string,
		RECIPIENT as string,
		COMPANY as string,
		{EXPEDITING START} as string,
		{EXPEDITING DUE} as string,
		{EXPEDITING FORECAST} as string,
		{EXPEDITING ACTUAL} as string,
		{RESPONSE STATUS} as string,
		{CLIENT RETURN TRANS. DATE} as string,
		{EXP ID} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true) ~> srcClosedMasterRAWLatest
srcClosedMasterRAWLatest derive({PROJECT NO.} = iif(length(regexSplit({PROJECT NO.},'[-]')[1])>5,concat('99',regexSplit({PROJECT NO.},'[-]')[1]),regexSplit({PROJECT NO.},'[-]')[1])) ~> DataTransformationClosedM
DataTransformationClosedM sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	deletable:false,
	insertable:true,
	updateable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	truncate:true,
	format: 'table',
	staged: true,
	allowCopyCommand: true,
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	errorHandlingOption: 'stopOnFirstError',
	mapColumn(
		project_number = {PROJECT NO.},
		project_id = {PROJECT ID},
		project_name = {PROJECT NAME},
		document_id = {DOC ID},
		deliverable = DELIVERABLE,
		document_number = {DOCUMENT NUMBER},
		document_status = {EXPEDITED ISSUE STATE},
		type_class = {TYPE CLASS},
		expedited_version = {EXPEDITED VERSION},
		expedited_revision = {EXPEDITED REVISION},
		current_version = {CURRENT VERSION},
		current_revision = {CURRENT REVISION},
		user_type = {USER TYPE},
		recipient = RECIPIENT,
		company = COMPANY,
		expediting_start = {EXPEDITING START},
		expediting_due = {EXPEDITING DUE},
		expediting_forecast = {EXPEDITING FORECAST},
		expediting_actual = {EXPEDITING ACTUAL},
		response_status = {RESPONSE STATUS},
		client_return_date = {CLIENT RETURN TRANS. DATE},
		expediting_id = {EXP ID}
	)) ~> snkClosedMSynapse
